  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Remove asset from service immediately and tag unsafe/nonconforming\",
    \"Inspect the affected joint, stud, nut, and mating components for damage or movement\",
    \"Torque castle nut to OEM specification and align slots without backing off below required torque\",
    \"Install correct OEM-specified cotter pin or approved retainer and verify full engagement\",
    \"Recheck alignment and perform quality gate inspection before return to service\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"A castle nut depends on a cotter pin or approved retainer as its positive locking device. With the cotter pin omitted while the asset is already in service, the suspension or steering joint is installed defective and non-compliant with OEM retention requirements. The likely failure mode is progressive nut loosening followed by joint separation, which can cause immediate loss of steering or suspension control.\",
  \"references\": [\"OEM suspension/steering fastener retention procedure\", \"OEM torque specification\", \"OEM alignment specs\"]
}' > /app/answer.json && jq . /app/answer.json"
